tools.description: Create canonical local experiment folders under experiments/<name>/ for a project. Use after reflection publish or experiment.create when planned experiments exist in state but their local folders do not yet exist.

experiment_id.description: Optional experiment id. When provided, materialize only that experiment's folder regardless of status.
experiment_id.title: Experiment Id

project_id.description: Explicit project scope. Project-local MCP adapters may fill this from hidden repo context before the call reaches core services.
project_id.title: Project Id

status.description: When experiment_id is omitted, materialize experiments with this status. Null materializes every experiment in the project.
status.title: Status

tools.name: experiment.materialize_folders

tools.description: Upload a local file to durable storage and complete the ledger object in one call. Relative paths are resolved against the project repo root; omit name to use the repo-relative path. Use storage for files that are too large or noisy for the repo or artifact submission, or expensive to regenerate: checkpoints/models, precious datasets, dataset shards, parquet/archive outputs, generated caches that must survive, and logs/traces over about 10 MB.

name.description: Optional storage object name. Defaults to the repo-relative path.
name.title: Name

path.description: Repo-relative file path to upload ('..' and absolute paths are rejected).
path.title: Path

project_id.description: Explicit project scope. Project-local MCP adapters may fill this from hidden repo context before the call reaches core services.
project_id.title: Project Id

tools.name: storage.upload_file

tools.description: Resolve a storage object and download it to a local file, verifying size and sha256 before replacing the destination.

overwrite.description: Refuse to replace an existing local file unless true.
overwrite.title: Overwrite

path.description: Repo-relative destination path ('..' and absolute paths are rejected).
path.title: Path

project_id.description: Explicit project scope. Project-local MCP adapters may fill this from hidden repo context before the call reaches core services.
project_id.title: Project Id

tools.name: storage.download_file

tools.description: Procure (reuse or create) a project sandbox, optionally attached to an experiment, and return SSH details plus runtime guidance for the remote work folder, expiry, copy-out, and durable storage. On Thunder Compute or Lambda Labs, omit instance_type to receive a live menu of available machines to pick from. SSH key custody: the sandbox authorizes a caller-side public key. The primary path is bring-your-own-key — the requesting agent generates its own ephemeral ed25519 keypair (ssh-keygen), keeps the private key to itself in a location only it can read, and passes only the single-line OpenSSH PUBLIC key as public_key so it gets authorized on the VM. Never send private-key material. The response's persisted public_key_source is 'caller' for new requests; legacy 'managed' rows remain readable/releasable. ssh.key_path appears only when a local proxy enrichment knows the private key path.

additional.description: When true with experiment_id, provision a new sandbox and add it to that experiment's active sandbox list instead of reusing an already attached live sandbox.
additional.title: Additional

cpu.description: Requested Modal CPU cores (1 core = 2 vCPUs). Default 2 cores. Ignored by Lambda Labs, where the instance_type fixes the vCPUs.
cpu.title: Cpu

experiment_id.description: Optional experiment to attach the sandbox to. Omit to create a standalone sandbox addressed by sandbox_uid.
experiment_id.title: Experiment Id

gpu.description: GPU type. On Modal a concrete attachable GPU (e.g. 'A100', 'H100'); omit for a CPU-only sandbox. On Lambda Labs a free-form filter over live instance types — prefer instance_type there.
gpu.title: Gpu

instance_type.description: Provider-bundled machine SKU (GPU + CPU + RAM together). Required by the Lambda Labs and Thunder Compute backends: call this with no instance_type (or use sandbox.options) to get a live menu, then pick one of options[].instance_type. Ignored by Modal (which composes the machine from gpu/cpu/memory).
instance_type.title: Instance Type

memory.description: Requested sandbox memory in MiB. Default 8192. Ignored by Lambda Labs, where the instance_type fixes the RAM.
memory.title: Memory

project_id.description: Explicit project scope. Project-local MCP adapters may fill this from hidden repo context before the call reaches core services.
project_id.title: Project Id

provider.description: Compute provider to serve this request when the deployment has several configured (e.g. lambda_labs, hyperstack, digitalocean). sandbox.options tags every hardware option with the provider that serves it — pass that value back together with its instance_type. Omit to use the default provider.
provider.title: Provider

public_key.description: Required OpenSSH public key to authorize on the VM. Pass only the single-line public key, never private-key material.
public_key.title: Public Key

region.description: Optional datacenter/region for the chosen instance_type (Lambda Labs). Omit to auto-pick a region that currently has capacity.
region.title: Region

time_limit.description: Max sandbox lifetime in seconds (60..86400). Default 3600.
time_limit.title: Time Limit

tools.name: sandbox.request

tools.description: Get sandbox status, SSH details, expiry, and polling/runtime guidance by sandbox_uid or by an experiment's active sandbox association. Use it to poll provisioning and inspect terminated or expired sandboxes. Includes public_key_source so callers know whether the VM authorized a caller-supplied public key or a legacy managed fallback key.

experiment_id.description: Experiment whose live sandbox association should be read. Omit when sandbox_uid is supplied.
experiment_id.title: Experiment Id

project_id.description: Explicit project scope. Project-local MCP adapters may fill this from hidden repo context before the call reaches core services.
project_id.title: Project Id

sandbox_uid.description: Optional sandbox_uid to read; omitted targets the primary sandbox.
sandbox_uid.title: Sandbox Uid

tools.name: sandbox.get

tools.description: Associate an existing running sandbox with an experiment without changing the VM, workdir, SSH connection, or lifecycle. A live sandbox can be associated with multiple active experiments.

experiment_id.description: Target experiment to attach the live sandbox to.
experiment_id.title: Experiment Id

project_id.description: Explicit project scope. Project-local MCP adapters may fill this from hidden repo context before the call reaches core services.
project_id.title: Project Id

sandbox_uid.description: Existing running sandbox_uid to associate with the target experiment.
sandbox_uid.title: Sandbox Uid

tools.name: sandbox.attach

tools.description: Copy selected files or directories from a running sandbox's remote experiment_dir into the local experiment folder over SSH/rsync. This is a proxy-local data tool: pass key_path for the caller-owned private key when sandbox.get does not already include ssh.key_path. Use object storage tools for heavy artifacts. Use this before artifact.submit or sandbox.release; omit paths to pull common retained outputs. Existing local files are kept unless overwrite=true — ones that differ from the sandbox are reported in files_kept_stale, so check it before submitting results from a re-run. Remote symlinks and device nodes are never recreated locally. One failing path is reported in errors/paths_failed without discarding the rest.

destination_path.description: Repo-relative local destination directory. Defaults to the sandbox's local_experiment_dir.
destination_path.title: Destination Path

experiment_id.description: Experiment whose running sandbox should be copied from. Omit when sandbox_uid is supplied.
experiment_id.title: Experiment Id

key_path.description: Local private key path for the caller-owned public_key authorized on the sandbox. Required when sandbox.get does not include an ssh.key_path enrichment.
key_path.title: Key Path

overwrite.description: When false, existing local files are preserved/refused. Set true only when replacing local retained outputs is intentional.
overwrite.title: Overwrite

paths.description: Repo-relative paths under the sandbox experiment_dir to pull. Omit to pull existing common outputs: results/, figures/, report.md, graph.json, metrics.json, and results.json.
paths.title: Paths

project_id.description: Explicit project scope. Project-local MCP adapters may fill this from hidden repo context before the call reaches core services.
project_id.title: Project Id

sandbox_uid.description: Optional sandbox_uid to copy from; omitted targets the primary sandbox.
sandbox_uid.title: Sandbox Uid

tools.name: sandbox.pull_outputs

tools.description: Check the execution backend is reachable.
tools.name: sandbox.health
